message:
fix(build): add hashmap_helper module to native_dispatch for wyhash support

native_dispatch.zig uses hashmap_helper.StringHashMap for fast function
lookups with wyhash. When compiled as a standalone module (via edgeboxc),
the relative import path failed.

Fixed by:
- Adding hashmap_helper as a proper module dependency in build.zig
- Creating hashmap_helper_mod for each target (wasm, native, embed, standalone)
- Using module import instead of relative path in native_dispatch.zig
